text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ngie

Log:
  Add sys/socket.h to SYNOPSIS for libprocstat(3)

  sys/socket.h is required for procstat_get_socket_info(3), added in
  r221807.

  MFC after:	1 month
  PR:		217884
  Submitted by:	tobik
